description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events to the new-test-runner branch. The workflow should have three jobs: linux, windows, and macos. The linux job runs on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-20.04, installing dependencies, building, and testing. The windows job runs on windows-latest, setting up msys2, installing dependencies, building, and testing. The macos job runs on macos-14, installing dependencies with brew, building, and testing.
